title: galium vernum subvar. halleri
intro: Galium vernum subvar. halleri, also known as green bedstraw, is a plant species within the genus Galium, characterized by its small white flowers and oval-shaped leaves. The medicinal properties of Galium vernum subvar. halleri include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant has been used to treat conditions such as digestive issues, wounds, and fever, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting healing. Herbal preparations of Galium vernum subvar. halleri include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications.
